---
title: "Things I read, and what I made of them."
subtitle: "ML engineer based in Germany. Notes on tech, papers, social science, and whatever else catches my attention."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [date, title, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  date-format: "MMM D"
page-layout: full
---
